new_value: {"notes":"Completed in a084bbc77. Removed SecureStack mutable Stack accessor, deleted unused public plaintext GET/POST/PUT helpers, and restricted raw CoAP transmission to crate-private OSCORE use. Validation: rustfmt on touched files, 124 node tests plus doctests, package-only strict Clippy, docs build, API grep, and three scoped reviews. Workspace-wide Clippy remains blocked by pre-existing lichen-schc manual_find/too_many_arguments lints."}
Completed in a084bbc77; SecureStack no longer exposes plaintext CoAP transmission
